race.description: Team Aidan Mother's Day Markets 10 May Mdn Plate
race.comment: KISSAVOS (5) good fresh gelding who returned with a slick on-pace second over 1000m at Port Macquarie. Expected to get off the mark here in a competitive contest. CERANO MAGIC (3) savaged the line on debut with a narrow third over 1000m at Port Macquarie. Will find this more to his liking and shapes as the main danger. SWEET MARLENE (12) strengthened over the break with a game second over 1006m at Port Macquarie. Likely improver who gets her chance with the claim. Each way. COMME CI COMME CA (1) second run for the new yard when resumed with a gritty on-pace second over 1008m at Port Macquarie. Finally drawn a decent gate and looks the value play in the race.
